  "themes": [
    {"id": "subject_soprano", "bar_start": 1, "bar_end": 4, "description": "Fugue subject enters in soprano (upper voice) on scale degree 1 (A), ascending stepwise with dotted-rhythm figures characteristic of the compound-triple meter, spanning a sixth with a sequential tail."},
    {"id": "subject_alto", "bar_start": 2, "bar_end": 5, "description": "Fugue subject answer enters in alto (middle voice) on scale degree 5 (E), a tonal answer at the dominant, beginning in bar 2."},
    {"id": "subject_bass", "bar_start": 4, "bar_end": 7, "description": "Fugue subject enters in bass (lowest voice) on scale degree 1 (A) in the lower octave, completing the three-part exposition."},
    {"id": "countersubject_1", "bar_start": 2, "bar_end": 5, "description": "First countersubject in the soprano, featuring running eighth-note figuration in contrary motion to the subject, providing harmonic support and rhythmic continuity."},
    {"id": "episode_I", "bar_start": 13, "bar_end": 16, "description": "Sequential episodic material derived from countersubject motives, modulating through b minor; features descending sequences in parallel thirds between upper voices."},
    {"id": "episode_II", "bar_start": 17, "bar_end": 24, "description": "Extended episode traversing f# minor and D major, employing invertible counterpoint and sequential motivic development from the subject tail."},
    {"id": "stretto_section", "bar_start": 25, "bar_end": 35, "description": "Stretto entries of the subject in close imitation; includes the notated spine-path exchange at bar 25 reflecting voice crossing between alto and soprano."},
    {"id": "virtuosic_episode", "bar_start": 36, "bar_end": 43, "description": "Extended episode with rapid sixteenth-note scalar passages in all three voices, passing through f# minor and c# minor; strong sequential descents by fifths."},
    {"id": "final_entries", "bar_start": 44, "bar_end": 53, "description": "Final statements of the fugue subject in A major with heightened harmonic motion, including modal mixture hints and a plagal approach to the final cadence."},
    {"id": "coda", "bar_start": 53, "bar_end": 54, "description": "Closing tonic confirmation with held final chord in all three voices, preceded by plagal and perfect authentic cadential motion."}
  ]
